name: Pineapple Cream Cheese Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the temperature specified on the pizza shell package.
2. Spread the softened cream cheese evenly over the unbaked pizza shell.
3. Mix sugar, flour, egg yolk, and lemon peel in a small bowl until combined.
4. Pour the mixture over the cream cheese on the pizza shell.
5. Sprinkle crushed pineapple evenly over the top of the crust.
6. Place the pizza shell in the preheated oven.
7. Bake according to the package instructions until the crust is golden brown and set.
8. Turn off the heat and remove the pizza from the oven when ready.
9. Let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
